name: availability-risk-scanner
description: Scan Huawei Cloud CCE availability risks including single replicas, missing PDBs, unhealthy probes, unreasonable affinity, node and workload AZ imbalance, gateway concentration, core addon anti-affinity, and resource request/limit overcommit.

tools.name: huawei_scan_cce_availability_risk
tools.description: Run huawei_scan_cce_availability_risk through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.
